code: import{PAYMENT_API_URL}from'../config';export const createPaymentSession=async(orderId,amount,currency,description)=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const response=await fetch("".concat(PAYMENT_API_URL,"/api/payment/apple-pay/session"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify({validationURL:'https://apple-pay-gateway.apple.com/paymentservices/startSession'})});return response.json();};export const processApplePayment=async function(orderId,amount){let productType=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:'membership';let productId=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:null;const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const payload={orderId,amount,productType,token:{paymentData:{version:'EC_v1',data:'mock_encrypted_data',signature:'mock_signature',header:{ephemeralPublicKey:'mock_public_key',publicKeyHash:'mock_hash',transactionId:'mock_transaction_'+Date.now()}},paymentMethod:{displayName:'Apple Pay',network:'Visa',type:'debit'},transactionIdentifier:'mock_transaction_'+Date.now()}};if(productId)payload.productId=productId;const response=await fetch("".concat(PAYMENT_API_URL,"/api/payment/apple-pay/process"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});return response.json();};export const getPaymentStatus=async orderId=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const response=await fetch("".concat(PAYMENT_API_URL,"/api/payment/status/").concat(orderId),{method:'GET',headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(token)}});return response.json();};export const refundPayment=async orderId=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const response=await fetch("".concat(PAYMENT_API_URL,"/api/payment/refund/").concat(orderId),{method:'POST',headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(token)}});return response.json();};
